INTRVNS_ACS_DSCHRG_CD O0110O1C Other: IV Access (Discharge) CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates whether the resident received IV access in the last three days of their SNF stay. 0=No
1=Yes effective 10/01/2023
1018 PRPHRL_ADMSN_CD PRPHRL_ADMSN_CD O0110O2A Other: IV Access - Peripheral (Admission) CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates whether the resident received peripheral IV access days one through three (on admission) of becoming a resident of the facility. 0=No
1=Yes effective
